name: Chest CT With Contrast
description: Chest CT with intravenous contrast for pulmonary vasculature and mediastinal evaluation

findings.technique: CT of the chest with intravenous contrast was performed.
findings.comparison: No prior studies available for comparison.

sections.name: Lungs
sections.content: Lungs are [clear / no consolidation / no mass / no nodules]. No interstitial process.

sections.name: Pulmonary Vessels
sections.content: Pulmonary arteries are [patent / no filling defect / no embolism]. No pulmonary infarction.

sections.name: Mediastinum
sections.content: Mediastinal and hilar structures [are unremarkable / no lymphadenopathy / no mass].

sections.name: Heart
sections.content: Heart [is normal in size / no pericardial effusion / no chamber enlargement].

impression:
1. No pulmonary embolism.
2. No mediastinal mass or lymphadenopathy.
3. Normal contrast-enhanced chest CT.
